tracks.rawText: 7:39somertUploadDream pop and baroque pop track in G major at 114 BPM, A clean electric guitar plays a syncopated, arpeggiated riff with heavy chorus and reverb, A deep, rounded synth bass follows the root notes of the chord progression, The drums feature a crisp snare and a steady kick with occasional 16th-note hi-hat flourishes, A lush string section provides sustained orchestral pads in the background, Female vocals are delivered in a breathy, ethereal mezzo-soprano style with significant plate reverb and delay, Subtle electronic textures and a high-pitched synth lead appear during the instrumental breaks, The arrangement builds with layered vocal harmonies and a driving rhythmic pulse in the choruses8PublishRemix
